summary: Iteration 25: Verified major UI overhaul with 3-tab navigation (Scan | Tracking | Profile), Profile tab functionality, VIP email access, and v2.2 version badge. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - login flow works, 3-tab navigation confirmed, Profile tab renders with all required elements (avatar, email, access level, total picks, password reset form, version v2.2, API status, Log Out button). No JS console errors.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns {status: ok}
POST /api/auth/verify-whop returns verified=true for josselj001@gmail.com (Owner account)
POST /api/auth/verify-whop returns access_type=Lifetime for michael1069_6910@yahoo.com (new VIP email)
POST /api/auth/verify-whop returns verified=false for invalid email
POST /api/auth/reset-password endpoint exists and responds correctly
POST /api/auth/reset-password validates password length (min 6 chars)
POST /api/picks/list requires authentication
POST /api/picks/list returns picks array for authenticated user
GET /api/cache/status returns valid counts
Frontend: Login flow works with owner email josselj001@gmail.com (auto-verifies)
Frontend: 3-tab bottom navigation (Scan | Tracking | Profile) all accessible
Frontend: Scan tab shows upload zone with camera icon, 'Tap to upload screenshot' text, 'CHOOSE IMAGE' button
Frontend: Tracking tab shows Record Tracker with HITS/MISSES/PUSHES/WIN%/STREAK stats and color-coded bar
Frontend: Tracking tab Live/History toggle works
Frontend: Profile tab renders with user avatar, email display (josselj001@gmail.com), access level (Owner), total picks count (9)
Frontend: Profile tab has password reset form with two password inputs and Update Password button
Frontend: Profile tab shows app version v2.2 and API status (Connected)
Frontend: Profile Log Out button exists and is functional (returns to login page)
Frontend: Profile password validation - shows error toast 'Passwords do not match' when passwords differ
Frontend: Version badge in header shows v2.2
Frontend: No console errors on any tab
critical_code_review_comments: Profile tab (App.js lines 2275-2365): Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
3-tab navigation (App.js lines 2370-2386): Clean implementation with Scan, Tracking, Profile tabs
Record Tracker (App.js lines 1350-1400): Shows HITS/MISSES/PUSHES/WIN%/STREAK with color-coded progress bar
Password reset validation (App.js lines 707-725): Proper client-side validation for min 6 chars and password match
VIP email list (config.py line 30): michael1069_6910@yahoo.com correctly added to LIFETIME_SUB_EMAILS

test_credentials.owner_email: josselj001@gmail.com (auto-login via Whop verification, access_type: Owner)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Major UI overhaul verified. App now has 3 tabs: Scan, Tracking, Profile. Profile tab includes: user avatar with username, OWNER badge, Account section (email, access level, total picks), Reset Password section (two password inputs + Update Password button), App section (version v2.2, API status), and Log Out button. Record Tracker in Tracking tab shows user's betting record with HITS/MISSES/PUSHES/WIN%/STREAK stats. VIP email michael1069_6910@yahoo.com has Lifetime access. All data-testid attributes are properly set for testing.

verified_features.login_flow: Owner account josselj001@gmail.com auto-verifies without password
verified_features.3_tab_navigation: Scan | Tracking | Profile tabs all working
verified_features.scan_tab: Upload zone with camera icon, 'Tap to upload screenshot' text, CHOOSE IMAGE button
verified_features.tracking_tab: Record Tracker with HITS/MISSES/PUSHES/WIN%/STREAK, Live/History toggle, pick cards

profile_tab.avatar: User avatar with username (josselj001) and OWNER badge
profile_tab.password_reset: Two password inputs + Update Password button with validation
profile_tab.logout: Log Out button functional - returns to login page

verified_features.header: ReversePicks logo, API status dot, v2.2 badge, notification bell, refresh button, logout button
